page_metadata.biotools__summary: META-BOA (METAbolomics data Balancing with Over-sampling Algorithms) is a software solution for handling sample imbalance primarily for metabolomics and lipidomics datasets.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: META-BOA (METAbolomics data Balancing with Over-sampling Algorithms) is a software solution for handling sample imbalance primarily for metabolomics and lipidomics datasets.
